nasb.text: It changes direction, turning around by His guidance, That it may do whatever He commands it On the face of the inhabited earth.

esv.text: They turn around and around by his guidance, to accomplish all that he commands them on the face of the habitable world.

cnv.text: 電光照著　神的指引來往旋轉， 在地球上行他一切所吩咐的。

ccb.text: 云随祂的指令旋转， 在地面之上完成祂的吩咐，
